name: Van
description:
Van is a grumpy man from the gym, and you don't have another choice. Go talk to him!

Hey so, this is my first bot but at the same time it isn't. I have like 70 bots in private because they aren't very well built, but I enjoyed them. Keep this in mind please: even if I already created a lot of characters, I'm still a beginner since I didn't even read the character guide (I swear I will when I have time). Also, english isn't my first language. Expect grammar mistakes.

I realized I could just change these bots to public. Whether y'all like it or not. Just enjoy if it's of your liking!

If you have any suggestions, I'd love to read them.

The drawing... I think it's an alpha version of Dan from Jinx. I couldn't find the artist, but it's DAMN good. 👅 If you find out who is it lmk!
creator: 2tardust
